name: Shirayuki
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'4") Shirayuki is a bright and resourceful girl, determined, able to speak her mind, and knowledgeable in both botany and medicine. Whenever there is a problem or conflict, she often takes matters into her own hands. She later learns to rely on others, especially Zen. Due to her rare hair color, Shirayuki gets a proposal to be a concubine of the foolish but famous prince Raji. As she cannot decline it, she escapes to the neighboring country. name: Undertaker
description: Known only by his profession, the Undertaker is a mysterious man whose scarred face is never fully visible beneath his long hair and crooked top hat. He occasionally provides information to Ciel. While he finds Ciel amusing and enjoys helping him out, he has nothing but disdain for the Queen. He tends to punctuate his words with sweeping gestures and creepy giggles and seems to spend a good deal of time inside of coffins. He also likes to hear jokes and ask people to tell him for exchanging info

name: Chito
description: She travels with [Yuuri](https://anilist.co/character/120890) on their Kettenkrad. She can read and write in the current language, but not in kanji or Latin alphabets, because they became old languages in this world. She loves reading and collecting books she finds during traveling.

name: Rory Mercury
nativeName: ロゥリィ・マーキュリー
description: A demigoddess and an apostle of Emroy, the god of darkness, war, violence and death. She is widely known as Rory the Reaper due to her wielding of her halberd as a scythe, slaughtering those who offend Emroy, and those she views are worthy of being punished by death. Her gothic lolita dress is an outfit for priestesses. In terms of age, she is the third-youngest Apostle of the Twelve Apostles. (Source: Gate - Thus the JSDF Fought There! Wiki)

name: Akihiko Kaji
description: __Height:__ 184 cm Akihiko Kaji is a college student in Given. Also the drummer in Ritsuka's band, he can play not only the drums but also violin, guitar, and bass.

name: Koneko Toujou
description: __Rank:__ Low-class devil (Former nekomata)/Rook __Power:__ Youjutsu A 10th grade student. Originally about to be executed by the devils after her sister, Kuroka, kills her own master. The Satan, Lucifer, protected her, and left her under his sister's, Rias' care - becoming her servant. She refused to use the power of youjutsu because she didn't want to become like her sister. She overcame her power along with Akeno after Issei made her overcome her own powers. She doesn't show any emotion at al

name: Himeko Inaba
description: Himeko is vice president of the Cultural Research Club. She excels in gathering information and analysis, possessing private data on each of the club members. She's calm and logical, but she's actually a bit clumsy, so her difficulty with roundabout phrasings causes her to surprise many of those around her with her blunt statements.

name: Togata
description: ~!**Gender:** Male!~ Togata is an avid film watcher whose film collection - and thus life purpose - burned up in a fire. Upon hearing about the mysterious man on fire, Togata decided to direct an autobiographical film in an effort to get back some meaning in life. Togata ended up accompanying [Agni](https://anilist.co/character/120594/Agni) on his journey and even helping him out at times. Togata often comes off as an unempathetic, but high-energy person, not caring for the feelings and wellbein

name: Jeanne
description: __Race:__ Vampire __Occupation:__ Chevalier (now), Bourreau (previously) A vampire who acts as the Chevalier to Luca. Jeanne is fiercely protective of Luca and gives off an air of rigidity and power while conducting her duty as his chevalier; however, she is prone to frantic outbursts, especially when in the presence of Vanitas, whom she dislikes. Due to her past as a bourreau, she is unused to having kindness directed towards her, and as a result, easily becomes flustered when she receives it.

She is also the voice of the internet artist Egoist who sings to release her emotions. name: Shouta Kazehaya
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5'9") Kazehaya is Sawako's outgoing classmate and friend. He is so popular that during middle school, so many girls liked him that they formed a "Kazehaya is Everyone's" Alliance in order to maintain some level of peace among his admirers. name: Yasushi Takagi
description: He plays percussion and is the leader of Blast, usually handling the business partnerships and financial decisions needed for the band's success. His favorite cigarette brand is "Black Stones", from which the band got their name. He is also a lawyer in training, despite his "scary" appearance (clean shaven head, many earrings and dark glasses). He's the big brother figure for Nana O—and sometimes Nobu—and acted as Nana's "guardian" when she arrived in Tokyo. In the past, he shared several ties w

name: Triela
description: She was former victim of a Mafia child smuggling group based in Amsterdam, Triela was one among many who regularly suffered abuse in the form of drugs, torture, rape and mutilation. She was rescued by a pair of Europol detectives, one of whom was her future handler, Hilshire. After being mortally wounded in a gunfight, Hilshire's partner bravely used the last of her strength to perform CPR on Triela, enabling Hilshire to save the child's life. Triela has a sarcastic wit and prefers to wear mascu

name: Xin Li
description: The hero of the story. A war orphan who aims to become the "World's Greatest General". He later meets Zheng Ying, the future first king that would rule all of China.

name: Barnaby Brooks Jr.
nativeName: バーナビー・ブルックス Ｊｒ．
description: Birthday: October 31, NC 1953 Barnaby is the newest hero in Sternbild City, and unlike the other heroes in the city who hide their identity, he does not and reveals himself to the world since he believes that that way of thinking is old and outdated. Like Wild Tiger, Barnaby can make his powers 100 times stronger for up to 5 minutes at a time. Barnaby is forced to team up with Wild Tiger, a veteran hero who likes to do things "the old fashioned way" unlike Barnaby's view that this way is outdate

name: Mireille Bouquet
description: An assassin with a painful past, Mireille is very good at hiding her emotions. Based in Paris, France, her operations have her traveling all over the world (even to the humble island country of Taiwan). She was born in Corsica, France, the island where Napoleon Bonaparte was born. A top-notch assassin, she still has some problems handling some tough, superior assassins. Intelligent, analytical, and seemingly cold without feelings, there's perhaps a fire burning with her that she never admits or

name: Shinji Hirako
description: __Height:__ 176 cm (5'9") __Shikai:__ Sakanade Shinji Hirako is the former captain of the 5th Division, preceding his lieutenant Sousuke Aizen. He distrusted Aizen from the day they met, and thus made him lieutenant so he could keep an eye on him. Shinji's character is somewhat comical, adding a bit of levity to situations that are otherwise serious. name: Princess Hibana
description: Hibana is a Third Generation pyrokinetic and Captain of the Special Fire Force Company 5.

name: Megumi Tadokoro
description: __Height:__ 154 cm __Cuisine Style:__ Hospitality Megumi is from a cold harbor town in the Tōhoku region and enrolled into Tōtosuki's junior high program hoping to be able to help her family's bed-and-breakfast the Shokei'en Inn. Because of her stage fright and shyness she performs poorly and causes her to rank at the bottom of her class. Megumi is clumsy and timid, thoughtful, kind and honest girl with polite manners. She is always looking out for others and is willing to assist them in any way

name: Makoto Tachibana
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6'0") Backstroke swimmer of the Iwatobi High School swimming team. Makoto Tachibana is Haruka's inseparable best friend since 11th grade. He understands Haruka's good points, and is often forced to speak as his spokesman. He is very kind and considerate, but is also very easily scared and weak-hearted. (Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

name: Oguri Cap
description: __Height:__ 167 cm Oguri Cap is a horse girl that always has a serious expression on her face. A country horse girl hailing from Kasamatsu. She is a gourmand as she is always seen eating large proportions of food. Despite her serious nature, she is quite naive, honest and not often paying much attention to the atmosphere around her. Her dedication is strong when it comes to food and races.
